---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement for DrawOver
title: "[Feature] "
labels: ["enhancement", "triage"]
assignees: []
---

## Feature Summary

A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see.

## Problem or Use Case

What problem does this feature solve? Or what workflow does it improve?

**Is your feature request related to a problem?** Please describe.

## Proposed Solution

Describe the solution you'd like. If you have multiple ideas, list them all.

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Additional Context

Add any other context, mockups, or screenshots about the feature request here.

## Priority

How important is this feature to you?

- [ ] Nice to have
- [ ] Would use regularly
- [ ] Blocking my workflow

---

> 💡 Check the [roadmap](https://github.com/codecoradev/drawover#roadmap) first — your idea might already be planned!
